assessment.note: She named mentoring as work that matters to her, which is a mild positive signal for growth and engagement, though the specific stretch is still unclear.

new_queue.label: Mentoring thread
new_queue.name: Mentoring matters to you — what about it feels most important right now?
new_queue.description: Drills into mentoring as the concrete thread she just named to surface what it represents for her growth.

new_queue.label: Direction
new_queue.name: When you imagine yourself eighteen months from now, what's actually different?
new_queue.description: Probes whether they have a real picture of where they want to go.

new_queue.label: Principal bar
new_queue.name: What does the next-level bar for Principal look like to you?
new_queue.description: Gets her to name the concrete standard she is aiming at, not a vague aspiration.

new_queue.label: Tradeoffs ahead
new_queue.name: What would you be willing to trade off to make room for the next step?
new_queue.description: Forces a real investment conversation about what has to give for growth to happen.

new_queue.label: Next move
new_queue.name: Given what we've covered, what is the next step you want to take before we meet again?
new_queue.description: Closes on one concrete commitment that lands the conversation in action.
